reviews.review_msg: This guy might be the goat of chem 233. He came from SFU to bless our class with a higher average than Jay's section. Cares a lot about us, would tell us research stories and the funniest jokes. Also very knowledgeable and always willing to answer questions.
The most underrated prof in UBC. He was extremely funny and knowledgable and made Chem 233 way more enjoyable that I thought it would be. Truly the GOAT
Knowledgeable, prepared, and patient professor who tries his best to make the course engaging through his own research stories. Approachable to ask questions and explains really clearly.

Arafeh is great professor. He teaches content well, he has lots of energy and is a really sweet man. He knows what he is talking about and the exams are super fair. You just need to go to class and you will be fine. Chem 233 requires a lot of practise on your own time but Arafeh lays out the foundations well. I would take his class again for sure.
